channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Trump tried to block state AI regulations, but some states are forging ahead
item.description: Six months after President Donald Trump warned states not to regulate artificial intelligence, they are increasingly doing just that.

item.title: Judge orders Trump administration to restore National Park changes at sites that ‘disparaged’ US
Tuberville faces renewed residency challenge in run for Alabama governor
